items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Appeal/retake scheduling' but did not provide any concrete evidence or results confirming its coverage. The evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to the appeal or retake process, leading to an inconclusive status. Additionally, prior steps indicate that other validations were blocked due to LLM evaluation failures, which further complicates the ability to assess this requirement.
